rule_metadata.author: Michael Haag, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Successful MSIX/AppX Package Installation

rules.rule_text:
title: Successful MSIX/AppX Package Installation
id: 289dfa9e-e378-4a56-a9d4-7ed5ee218029
status: experimental
description: 'Detects successful MSIX/AppX package installations on Windows systems
  by monitoring EventID 854 in the Microsoft-Windows-AppXDeployment-Server/Operational
  log.

  While most installations are legitimate, this can help identify unauthorized or
  suspicious package installations.

  It is crucial to monitor such events as threat actors may exploit MSIX/AppX packages
  to deliver and execute malicious payloads.

  '
references:
- https://www.splunk.com/en_us/blog/security/msix-weaponization-threat-detection-splunk.html
author: Michael Haag, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
date: 2025-11-03
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1204.002
- detection.threat-hunting
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: appxdeployment-server
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 854
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate MSIX/AppX package installations
level: low
